vexclient.name: Vex Client
vexclient.screen.menu.title: Vex Client
vexclient.screen.performance.paragraph:
Vex Client alpha intentionally does not change vanilla performance yet.

This tab reserves space for thoughtful, ethical QoL overlays (education, diagnostics, and optional pacing hints—not exploits).
vexclient.screen.settings.title: Settings
vexclient.screen.settings.hint: Toggles autosave instantly to .minecraft/config as readable JSON.
vexclient.title.overlay.headline: VEX CLIENT
vexclient.title.overlay.subtitle: Quality of Life — Alpha
